properties.email:
Veteran Clinical Treatment: adrien.dukes@vvsd.net
Non-Veteran Programs: ashley.anderson@vvsd.net
properties.description: 3.5 and 3.1 Residential Substance Treatment serves homeless men and women with substance use disorders with an additional focus toward military veteran needs. Is an intensive, residential rehabilitation program treating substance use disorders and co-occurring disorders which is designed to address barriers to wellness and decrease the severity of negative and dangerous behaviors. This population also suffers with additional significant challenges including mental illness, environmental risk factors, legal complications and impaired coping skills. The program incorporates mental health treatment, medically assisted treatment (MAT) and many other clinically necessary services as part of the treatment plan.
